PART ONE

The Bell Above the Harbor

Morning

No wind.

Just gulls.

And one cracked bell.

Ledger Notes

Receipts in the top drawer.
Letters in the middle drawer.
The key beneath the folded map.

Instructions

Knock once.
Wait.
Knock again.

If no one answers, leave the parcel with the porter.

Afternoon

Shadows climb first.
Then the temperature falls.
Then everyone remembers what they meant to say.
